name: EarthLabs Inc.
description: EarthLabs Inc. is a mining investment, technology, and media company that provides strategic leverage to the metals and mining sector. The company operates a suite of data-driven media platforms, including CEO.CA, The Northern Miner, MINING.COM, and the Canadian Mining Journal, which collectively reach a significant portion of the North American junior mining audience. By combining these media assets with proprietary data tools and a history of successful resource investment, EarthLabs aims to shape industry narratives, discover high-potential junior mining opportunities, and create lasting value for its stakeholders within the global resource market.
